name: SCN-006 | PowerShell Execution & AMSI Bypass
description: Simulates attacker abuse of PowerShell for execution and defense evasion. Step 1 demonstrates Base64-encoded command execution to bypass string-matching defenses. Step 2 narrates AMSI bypass via AmsiScanBuffer memory patching — explaining how attackers disable PowerShell's security scanning layer. Step 3 simulates an IEX download cradle with spoofed user-agent used to pull stage-2 payloads from a C2 server. Designed to showcase Sophos Intercept X AMSI integration and behavioral PowerShell detections.
